Headline: #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Reroute at Cottage Grove/72nd

Headline: #92 Foster Temporary Westbound Reroute near Foster/Damen
ShortDescription: Westbound #92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Foster/Damen.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Foster/Damen.

Westbound #92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted via Foster, Damen, Lawrence, Western then resume their normal route on Foster.
